name: Wood and Metal Console Table Natural - Room Essentials™
description:
Elevate your home aesthetic with this Wood and Metal Console Table from Room Essentials™. Supported by a black metal frame, this console table features a natural-tone wooden rectangular tabletop and a wooden lower shelf. You can place a variety of items like vases, framed photos and lamps on the wooden tabletop and use the lower shelf for extra storage. Designed with a sleek look, it'll add minimalist charm to any room's decor.

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width: 40 inches
Overall Height: 29.7 inches
Overall Depth: 15 inches
Distance between front legs: 35.3 inches
Distance between front leg and back leg: 10.9 inches
Distance between top shelf and bottom shelf: 24.2 inches
Width of Bottom shelf: 37.6 inches
Depth of bottom shelf: 10.8 inches
Distance from floor to bottom shelf: 4 inches

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
